channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 59/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 59/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 14.5%.

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Mandelson files latest: Starmer to chair Cabinet meeting after files reveal criticism of ‘beleaguered’ No10 operation
item.description: Mandelson files latest: Starmer to chair Cabinet meeting after files reveal criticism of ‘beleaguered’ No10 operation

item.title: The Guardian: Keir Starmer - The Guardian
ConservativeHome: Lord Ashcroft: Labour leadership contenders, is this government better or worse than the Tories, who do people least want to see in office, and should we rejoin the EU?
item.description: Lord Ashcroft: Labour leadership contenders, is this government better or worse than the Tories, who do people least want to see in office, and should we rejoin the EU?

item.title: FT UK Politics: Blair has shone a spotlight on Starmer’s growth delusion
item.description: Blair has shone a spotlight on Starmer’s growth delusion

item.title: The Guardian: Victorian minister under fire for writing 33 character references including for taxi driver who assaulted women - The Guardian
item.description: Victorian minister under fire for writing 33 character references including for taxi driver who assaulted women - The Guardian

item.title: The Guardian: Mandelson files reveal Labour party is riddled with doubts and infighting - The Guardian
item.description: Mandelson files reveal Labour party is riddled with doubts and infighting - The Guardian

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Reform UK support could plateau as it relies on socially conservative views, study finds
item.description: Reform UK support could plateau as it relies on socially conservative views, study finds

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Sadiq Khan to back social media ban for under-16s after Starmer promised ‘game-changer’ action
item.description: Sadiq Khan to back social media ban for under-16s after Starmer promised ‘game-changer’ action

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Britain rejoining the EU in future is ‘an inevitability’, says minister
item.description: Britain rejoining the EU in future is ‘an inevitability’, says minister

item.title: ITVX: Mandelson said the government would 'never regret' his appointment as ambassador, files show | ITV News - ITVX
item.description: Mandelson said the government would 'never regret' his appointment as ambassador, files show | ITV News - ITVX
